item.title: Kubernetes DaemonSet
item.author: Author
item.description: What is the DaemonSet? DaemonSet The DaemonSet is working for managing PODs that you need to deploy or delete all Nodes in the cluster. That means, when you add a Node in the cluster or delete one of them, DeaemonSet is deploying or deleting POD to the Node. How to work DaemonSet in Kubernetes Behavior till v1.12 The Kubernetes uses nodeName property. From v1.12 The Kubernetes uses default scheduler and NodeAffinity property.
